title: Loneliness
content:
How green and strange the light is,
    Creeping through the window.
    Lying alone in bed,
    How strange the night is!

    How still and chill the air is.
    It seems no sound could live
    Here in my room
    That now so bare is.

    All bright and still the room is,
    But easeless here am I.
    Deep in my heart
    Cold lonely gloom is!
meaning:
John Frederick Freeman's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Loneliness"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
